title: callista subacaulis
intro: Callista subacaulis, also known as the Australian callista, is a species of sea snail shell used as a herbal remedy. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Callista subacaulis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Callista subacaulis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or capsules, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
